title: Jeff Yan: Integrity and fairness are not bargaining chips
description:
Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Jeff Yan: Integrity and fairness are not bargaining chips

On February 19, Hyperliquid founder Jeff Yan said in an interview with When Shift Happens that integrity and fairness are never decisions to be weighed against costs. Compromising on integrity and taking shortcuts can indeed lead to faster growth - as seen with FTX, which achieved rapid expansion in the short term through such compromises.

However, he argued that yielding on integrity could carry a "potentially infinite" long-term cost. Therefore, Hyperliquid has adhered to a strict "no insider" principle since day one, maintaining fairness and openness toward both users and developers.

title: Lisovo Hardfork
description:
Polygon Foundation (@0xPolygonFdn): Lisovo Hardfork

The Lisovo hardfork will be released on Polygon mainnet before block number 83756500, at approximately 2pm UTC on Mar 4.

This update: subsidizes agent-to-agent gas costs for payments (PIP-82), improves smart contract compatibility for the Count Leading Zeros (CLZ), includes better support for passkey-based wallets, enables flexible fee tuning, and includes improvements for more reliable transaction delivery and stronger checks.

All node operators should upgrade Bor to v2.6.0 (or Erigon to v3.4.0).

See the countdown: https://polygonscan.com/block/countdown/83756500
